title: EC Alex's Caves Compat
description: adds compatibility between Expanded Combat And Alex's Caves
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-alexs-cave-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Alex's Caves Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a52f072a5565027f89a480fe22e30610b1b1531.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Alex's Caves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves). ### adds support for: galena gauntlet functions in gauntlet slot \ Scarlet/Azure Neodymium - shields (has some of the effects of the resistor shield) \ Pewen wood - shields, and weapons \ Primitive Block Weapons - follow a similar style to the Primitive Club \ Tough Hide - shields, and gauntlets \ Acid errodes gauntlets \ Polymer Plate - shield Shadow Silk - shields, and gauntlets \ Thornwood - shields, and weapons \ \ Click the banner to get the discount:
